input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.12.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.12.3.1
            TITLE: brake test procedure:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.12.3.1: Brake Test procedure:
IN.12.3.1 Brake Test procedure: 
a. Accelerate to speed until reaching the designated area 
b. Switch off the Tractive System  
c. Apply the brakes with force sufficient to demonstrate full lockup of all four wheels

final_answer: Brake Test procedure: IN.12.3.1 Brake Test procedure: a. Accelerate to speed until reaching the designated area b. Switch off the Tractive System c. Apply the brakes with force sufficient to demonstrate full lockup of all four wheels
